title: Total RNA Extraction Protocol
author: Yuan Yao
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qafdsbn

steps.title: Remove growth media
steps.instruction: Remove growth media.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent per 1 × 105—107 cells directly to the culture dish to lyse the cells.

steps.title: Pipet the lysate up and down several times to homogenize
steps.instruction: Pipet the lysate up and down several times to homogenize.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 minutes to permit...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes to permit complete dissociation of the nucleoproteins complex.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.2 mL of chloroform or 50 μL of 4-bromoanisole per 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent used for lysis, then securely cap the tube.

steps.title: Incubate for 2–3 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate for 2–3 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample for 15 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample for 15 minutes at 12,000 × g at 4°C.

steps.title: Transfer ~600 μL of the colorless,...
steps.instruction: Transfer ~600 μL of the colorless, upper aqueous phase containing the RNA to a new tube.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of 70%...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of 70% ethanol, then mix well by vortexing.

steps.title: Invert the tube to disperse any...
steps.instruction: Invert the tube to disperse any visible precipitate that may form after adding ethanol.

steps.title: Transfer up to 700 uL of...
steps.instruction: Transfer up to 700 uL of the sample to a spin cartridge (with collection tube).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the spin cartridge into the same collection tube.

steps.title: Repeat step 2a–step 2c until the...
steps.instruction: Repeat step 2a–step 2c until the entire sample has been processed.

steps.title: Add 700 μL of Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 700 μL of Wash Buffer I to the spin cartridge.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the spin cartridge into the same collection tube.

steps.title: Add 500 μL of Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of Wash Buffer II to the spin cartridge.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the spin cartridge into the same collection tube.

steps.title: Repeat step 18-step 20 once
steps.instruction: Repeat step 18-step 20 once.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 1 minute to dry the membrane.

steps.title: Discard the collection tube, then insert...
steps.instruction: Discard the collection tube, then insert the spin cartridge into a recovery tube.

steps.title: Add 30 μL-3 × 100 μL...
steps.instruction: Add 30 μL-3 × 100 μL (3 sequential elutions with 100 μL each) of RNase-free water to the center of thespin cartridge.

steps.title: Incubate for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1 minute.

steps.title: Centrifuge at >12,000 × g for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at >12,000 × g for 2 minutes.

steps.title: RNA integrity was verified by electrophoresis on a 1
steps.instruction: RNA integrity was verified by electrophoresis on a 1.2% agarose gel containing formaldehyde, and post stained with 1.0 μg/ml ethidium bromide.

steps.title: Determine the quality and quantity of...
steps.instruction: Determine the quality and quantity of the purified RNA using UV absorbance at 260 nm.
